title: IIT Madras
snippet: IIT Madras is a public technical university located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Established in 1959, it is one of the premier engineering institutions in India.
text: IIT Madras is a public technical university located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Established in 1959, it is one of the premier engineering institutions in India.

title: Anna University
snippet: Anna University is a technical university located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It was established in 1978 and offers undergraduate and postgraduate programmes.
